title: cyperus obtusiflorus var. sphaerocephalus
intro: Cyperus obtusiflorus var. sphaerocephalus, also known as the Round-headed umbrella sedge, is a plant species within the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyperus obtusiflorus var. sphaerocephalus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
